query:
-- Buscar todas as vendas e seus companyIds
SELECT id, buyerName, saleValue, saleDate, companyId 
FROM sales 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 30;

-- Contar vendas por companyId
SELECT companyId, COUNT(*) as total 
FROM sales 
GROUP BY companyId;

ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 30;

-- Contar vendas por companyId

FROM sales 
GROUP BY companyId;
